policy.reason: Prevent blocked_symbols from becoming a post-hoc selection-bias sink. Current lists are frozen; new blocked strategy-symbol cells require explicit evidence before the config can change.
policy.runtime_effect: No runtime mutation. Existing config behavior is unchanged.
new_block_requirements: PA or operator RFC that names the strategy-symbol cell and expected runtime scope
DSR/PBO selection-bias evidence or an explicit QC waiver explaining why the cell is not promotable evidence
TODO.md update that separates source freeze, runtime deploy, and observation follow-up

grid_trading.freeze_basis: G2-04 robust-negative grid cells plus P1-DATA-1 LABUSDT and post-rebuild BILLUSDT negative-cell guards. No additional grid block is allowed without the policy evidence above.

ma_crossover.freeze_basis: Existing MA per-strategy blocklist including P1-EDGE-1 LABUSDT. No additional MA block is allowed without the policy evidence above.
